Property Value

FrameStats

PopupWindows

Live out-of-bounds popup windows (E4) — for headless checks (decode each slot's DrawList).

public IReadOnlyList<PopupWindowSlot> PopupWindows { get; }

Property Value

IReadOnlyList<PopupWindowSlot>

PopupWindowsEnabled

Whether out-of-bounds popup WINDOWS are available (the engine's CPopup::DoesPlatformSupportWindowedPopup gate). Defaults to true only on the headless path: the headless device creates independent swapchains, so the COMPLETE windowed-popup pipeline (PAL window + own swapchain + subtree DrawList) runs and is verifiable. needs-pixels — D3D12 stays false until the per-target submit lands: IGpuDevice.SubmitDrawList has no present-target parameter and D3D12Device.CreateSwapchain is a one-shot device init (D3D12Device.cs:95-122), so a second swapchain cannot be rendered yet. When false, overlays asking for PopupOptions.ConstrainToRootBounds = false silently fall back to in-window clamped placement (exactly WinUI on platforms without windowed-popup support).

public bool PopupWindowsEnabled { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Scene 

public SceneStore Scene { get; }

Property Value

SceneStore

SmoothScroll

Enable inertial smooth scrolling + auto-hiding scrollbars (the real app turns this on; off = immediate).

public bool SmoothScroll { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Methods

Dispose()

Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

public void Dispose()

Paint(int)

Phases 3–12: flush reactive work, (scoped) re-layout, record, submit, present, effects. No pump — safe from WndProc.

public FrameStats Paint(int clicks = 0)

Parameters

clicks int

Returns

FrameStats

RunFrame()

Run one full frame: pump + input, then paint (the reactive flush + layout + record happen in Paint).

public FrameStats RunFrame()

Returns

FrameStats
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
